overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic urban downtown area with towering skyscrapers, neon signage, and tropical vegetation. The player character walks along a paved sidewalk past a green sports car and an NPC, then turns right to reveal a large red floral sculpture and an overpass with holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon accents and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward an NPC standing near a green sports car

notable_agents.action: standing beside a green sports car, facing the street with arms crossed

entered.detail: futuristic green sports car with red accents and Japanese text decals on the side
massive futuristic skyscraper with vertical ribbed facade dominating the skyline
black metal railing with glowing green neon accents running along the left side
tropical palm trees and vegetation lining the right side of the walkway
large holographic advertisement floating above the street on the left

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a futuristic city sidewalk. A green sports car is parked on the right with an NPC standing beside it. The path is bordered by a metal railing with green neon lights on the left and palm trees on the right, with a massive glass skyscraper towering in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved street corner with overpass and dense holographic advertisements

events.description: camera turns right around the green sports car, changing direction from straight to curved rightward path

agents.ego_description: turning right around the parked green car and continuing along the curved sidewalk toward the overpass

entered.detail: large red spiky flower-like sculpture or artificial plant in a concrete planter
elevated highway or monorail structure with metal framework spanning across the street
dense cluster of colorful holographic billboards and neon signs under the overpass
line of parked vehicles along the right side of the curved street

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right around the green sports car, revealing a curved street corner with a large red flower sculpture on the left. As the walk continues, the view opens up to show a concrete overpass ahead covered in dense holographic advertisements. The palm trees that were on the right now appear on the left as the camera changes direction, and the massive skyscraper shifts to the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement along a futuristic city sidewalk that transitions from a linear path into a wide, neon-lit urban intersection. It begins by moving past a parked green sports car and an NPC, with a metal railing glowing in green neon on the left and a massive glass skyscraper looming in the distance. As the camera turns right around the vehicle, the perspective shifts to reveal a large red flower sculpture on the left and a curved street corner. The scene then opens up to show a concrete overpass ahead draped in dense holographic advertisements, while the palm trees and towering skyscraper shift to the left side of the frame as the direction of travel changes.
